name: provana-quality
description: Pre-commit code review, test coverage enforcement, and quality gates for Provana engineering teams

code-review.description: E2E code review checklist covering correctness, security, performance, naming, test coverage, and language-specific rules (Python/FastAPI, TypeScript/Next.js, SQL). Use before creating a PR or when reviewing someone else's code.

test-coverage.description: Test coverage strategy and patterns for Python (pytest) and TypeScript/JavaScript (jest/vitest). Coverage thresholds, what to test vs mock, integration vs unit. Use when writing tests or reviewing test quality.

pre-commit-quality-gate.description: Intercepts commit-related prompts and runs quality checks: lint, type check, test run. Blocks commit if checks fail. Claude Code only.
